headline: Palantir’s stock bounces back as analyst cheers company’s unique AI advantage

headline: Why Tesla’s stock sank to its worst day in a year despite blowout delivery numbers
detail: A significant drop in a major tech/growth stock, even with good news, can signal broader weakness or investor caution in the tech sector. This is a potential headwind for your concentrated portfolio.
rec: No action. You don't hold Tesla, but this highlights potential volatility for your tech-heavy book.

headline: Trump bought Apple, Nvidia and other tech giants before tariff reversal fueled rebound
